overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing exploration of a gothic castle interior. The character ascends grand staircases, enters the Defense Against the Dark Arts classroom with a massive hanging dragon skeleton, and walks through ornate hallways with marble floors and portraits.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with monumental staircase

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand stone staircase toward the upper landing

notable_agents.action: character in dark robes standing at the top of the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps ascending to upper level
ornate dark wood and stone balustrades with gold trim
ornate dark wood and stone balustrades with gold trim
tall carved stone pillars supporting arched ceiling
tall carved stone pillars supporting arched ceiling
decorative planters with white flowers on pedestals
decorative planters with white flowers on pedestals

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the base of a grand gothic staircase with ornate railings and stone columns. The camera ascends the wide stone steps, passing decorative flower urns, toward a character standing at the top landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper landing and secondary staircase leading to classroom

events.description: enters the Defense Against the Dark Arts classroom through wooden double doors
lighting shifts to brighter interior with sunbeams streaming through tall windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper landing and entering the classroom

notable_agents.action: professor in blue robes standing near the desk by the window

entered.detail: smaller stone staircase leading up to classroom entrance
tall arched windows with colorful glass panels depicting robed figures
large wooden double doors with metal studs
rows of student desks and benches arranged in the classroom
massive skeletal remains of a dragon suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera moves across the upper landing and ascends a secondary staircase toward the DADA classroom. After entering through wooden doors, the scene opens into a bright classroom with stained glass windows, rows of desks, and a massive dragon skeleton hanging overhead. A professor stands near the window.

scene_state.functional_zone: Defense Against the Dark Arts classroom with suspended skeleton

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full dragon skeleton hanging from the vaulted ceiling
camera pans down to show the circular magical symbol inlaid in the wooden floor

agents.ego_description: moving through the classroom, examining the dragon skeleton and surroundings

notable_agents.action: professor walking across the classroom floor toward the front desks

entered.detail: large dark chalkboard with magical diagrams and writing
tall wooden cabinets filled with books and artifacts
small internal staircase leading to upper platform
circular blue and gold emblem inlaid in wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the spacious classroom interior, tilting up to reveal the massive dragon skeleton suspended from the ceiling, then panning across rows of desks, bookcases, and a chalkboard. The professor walks across the floor near a circular emblem while sunlight streams through tall windows.

events.description: exits classroom into hallway with polished marble floors and golden statue

agents.ego_description: walking along the marble hallway passing the golden statue

entered.detail: large golden bronze statue of a robed figure holding a sword on marble pedestal
highly polished marble tiles with geometric inlay patterns
series of gothic arches receding into the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the classroom, the scene transitions to a grand hallway with polished marble floors. The camera passes a large golden statue of a robed figure on the left while moving toward a series of gothic arches that recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: long gallery corridor with portrait paintings

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor toward other students in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of students in uniforms walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: framed portraits hanging on the stone walls in gold frames
bright light at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down a long gallery corridor lined with portrait paintings in gold frames. The marble floor continues as the camera approaches a group of students walking ahead toward a brightly lit archway at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a grand gothic staircase into a sprawling academic classroom before gliding through ornate castle galleries. It begins at the base of a wide stone staircase with ornate railings, climbing past decorative urns toward a character waiting on the upper landing. As the camera moves across the landing and through wooden doors, the space opens into a bright Defense Against the Dark Arts classroom where sunlight streams through stained glass and a massive dragon skeleton hangs suspended from the ceiling. The view then pans across rows of desks and bookcases before exiting the room and transitioning into a grand hallway characterized by polished marble floors and a large golden statue. Finally, the camera proceeds down a long gallery corridor lined with gold-framed portraits, following a group of students toward a brightly lit archway in the distance.
